title: W11316256 Water Inlet Valve, Washer Maintenance, Fill Valve Washer Parts Compatible with W11688995, AP7218603, W11036930
features: Premium Material: Valve W11036930 is constructed from stainless steel and ABS plastic. The metal components use high-grade stainless steel for enhanced moisture resistance, effectively preventing rust and cracking. The conductive metal plug ensures superior sensitivity through optimized conductivity.

Strong Practicality: This washing machine water inlet valve addresses common issues including water level control failures, leakage problems, and integrates a built-in filtration system to remove impurities from incoming water.

Scope of Application: Replaceable Part Number: W11688995 washer water inlet valve replaces W11316256, W11036930 and AP7218603. Compatible with Whirlp, Kitchen Aid, JennAir, Amana, Maytag, Magic Chef, Admiral, Norge, Roper, Inglis.

Easy to Use: Featuring a universal interface, this tool-free water inlet valve enables straightforward installation without specialized skills. Installation requires disconnecting the washer's power supply and water supply line, with recommended use of protective gloves for safety.

Long Working Time: The washer water inlet valve employs optimized flow path design to reduce operational noise below 40dB. Its hydrodynamic structure ensures quiet operation even during nighttime use, maintaining household tranquility.
description: Feature: 【Reliable Material】 Valve W11036930 is crafted from stainless steel metal and ABS plastic material. Its metal components are made of high grade stainless steel, which gives the valve excellent moisture-resistant properties and is able to effectively resist rusting and cracking. The metal plug, which is connected to the wire, realizes higher sensitivity thanks to its excellent conductivity. As for the shell part, the choice of high-strength ABS plastic, not only outstanding hardness, but also very wear-resistant, greatly extending the service life of the valve. In addition, the seams of the water valve are designed to be extremely precise, effectively reducing the possibility of water leakage and ensuring the excellent sealing performance of the valve. 【Problem Solving】The water inlet valve designed specifically to solve the washing machine, can effectively deal with the water level control failure, water leakage problems, while filtering out the impurities in the water. 【Silent Design】Washer water inlet valve through the fine optimization of the water flow path design, significantly reduce the noise generated by the water flow, even if it is used at night, but also to ensure that the quiet without disturbing, for your home life to add a quiet and comfortable. 【Easy Installation】Washing machine water inlet valve adopts universal interface design, no need for professional knowledge to complete the installation, saving time and energy. During the installation process, please disconnect the power and water source of the washing machine and wear work gloves to protect your hands. 【Wide Use】Replaceable Part Number: W11688995 washer water inlet valve replaces W11316256, W11036930 and AP7218603. Compatible with Whirlp, KitchenAid, JennAir, Amana, Maytag, Magic Chef, Admiral, Norge, Roper, Inglis.
